---
description: "Start the new feature flow: the Product Owner agent clarifies the demand, prepares a tracker-card draft, and only creates it after explicit approval."
agent: "product-owner"
---

A new feature request has been received. Follow the Product Owner workflow:

1. Clarify the demand — ask questions if anything is ambiguous or incomplete
2. Resolve the tracker configured for this project and search existing cards/issues/tickets when access is available
3. Define the task with business context, scope, and acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then)
4. Assign priority (P0–P3) with justification
5. Show the full draft of the tracker card and wait for explicit approval before any write action
6. If approved and writable MCP support exists, create/update the card; otherwise stop with a ready-to-copy draft
7. Post the structured output with demand summary, tracker status, task draft, acceptance criteria, and priority

Always consult project documentation under `/docs` before drafting or creating the card.
